title: secretx-core: add inventory dep + registration types
description:
Add the inventory crate as a dependency to secretx-core and define the three registration structs (BackendRegistration, WritableBackendRegistration, SigningBackendRegistration) with inventory::collect! calls.

What: Lay the foundation for open-world dispatch by defining the registration types that backends will use to register themselves.

Algorithm:
1. Add inventory = '0.3' to secretx-core/Cargo.toml [dependencies]
2. In secretx-core/src/lib.rs, add use statements for Arc and inventory
3. Define: pub struct BackendRegistration { pub name: &'static str, pub factory: fn(&str) -> Result<Arc<dyn SecretStore>, SecretError> }
4. Call inventory::collect!(BackendRegistration); at module level
5. Define: pub struct WritableBackendRegistration { pub name: &'static str, pub factory: fn(&str) -> Result<Arc<dyn WritableSecretStore>, SecretError> }
6. Call inventory::collect!(WritableBackendRegistration); at module level
7. Define: pub struct SigningBackendRegistration { pub name: &'static str, pub factory: fn(&str) -> Result<Arc<dyn SigningBackend>, SecretError> }
8. Call inventory::collect!(SigningBackendRegistration); at module level
9. All three structs must be pub and re-exported at the crate root

Defensive programming rules:
- All three structs must be Sync + Sized + 'static (verified by inventory::collect! at compile time)
- Function pointer type must match exactly — use fn (not closure type) to remain Sync + 'static
- No unwrap() anywhere
- No logging of URI content in factories

Agent team: standard (Researcher + Implementer + Tester + Validator)
